description: Viewer for Frigate NVR with smart URL switching and notifications Phylax is an Android viewer for the self-hosted Frigate NVR. Unofficial and not affiliated with the Frigate project. * Auto URL switching between internal (LAN) and external Frigate based on Wi-Fi SSID. * Background notifications with snapshot thumbnails. Alerts open the Review timeline; detections open the Explore view. * Per-camera, per-zone and severity filters. One notification per tracked event. * CPU and GPU badges in the top bar. Tap for RAM, uptime, per-detector inference and per-camera FPS. * Connection status dialog with a live latency graph. * mTLS client certificate support. * Two-way talk on doorbell and intercom cameras. * Clip and snapshot downloads. * Reliable on Android 14+ with SPECIAL_USE foreground service, wake locks and a WorkManager watchdog. No analytics, no cloud, no account. Credentials kept in encrypted local storage. Compatible with Frigate 0.12+ for notifications, 0.13 to 0.17 for stats.
